title: lastrea subandina
intro: Lastrea subandina, also known as the Andean Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to the high-altitude regions of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea subandina include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas or infusions by steeping the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
